full_text:
Zhang Chao (Zibing) 張超 (子並)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Chao (張超), styledZibing (子並), was born in Hejian. A man of great literary ability, he assisted Zhu Jun against the Turbans. Zhang Chao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
